settings.description: The gold standard in all-season performance. Outstanding wet braking and confident handling from spring through fall in Calgary.
Continental's top-rated Nordic winter tire. Engineered for severe snow and ice — consistently ranked #1 in European winter tire tests.
German-engineered all-terrain for trucks and SUVs. Handles off-road adventure without sacrificing on-road comfort or fuel economy.
Luxury touring performance for sedans and crossovers. Smooth, quiet ride with confident wet and dry traction for everyday driving.

settings.subtitle: Continental's advanced tire technology delivers outstanding wet-weather performance and winter grip that Canadian drivers depend on. Trusted by European drivers worldwide.
settings.cta_description: In-stock selection available. Same-day installation with professional mounting, balancing, and alignment.
